title: February 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 19''' is the 50th day of the year. There are 315 days remaining, 316 in leap years.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Donald F. Glut]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Jessica Tuck]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Benicio Del Toro]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Brendan Hay]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Josh Trank]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[Nigel D. Findley]] dies.
*[[2000]] – [[George Roussos]] dies.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] released.
*[[2007]] – [[Star Wars Insider 92|''Star Wars Insider'' 92]] published.
*2007 – [[User:Jorrel Fraajic|Jorrel Fraajic]] starts a new sister project of [[Wookieepedia]], the [[Wookieepedia:Star Wars Merchandise Wiki|Star Wars Merchandise Wiki]].
*[[2014]] – [[Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows 3|''Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows'' 3]] is released.
*2014 – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force War 4|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force War'' 4]] is released.
*2014 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 7]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars Headspace]]'' is released digitally.
*2016 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]'' is released for [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Android_(operating_system) Android] devices.
*[[2017]] – [[Chris Wiggins]] dies.
*[[2018]] – "[[Jedi Night]]" and "[[DUME]]" air on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2020]] – [[Coruscant (booklet)|''Coruscant'']] published in French.
*[[2025]] – [[Ahsoka 8|''Ahsoka'' 8]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi 1|''The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi'' 1]] published.
*[[2027]] - ''[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope]]'' is set to be released in theaters in its original theatrical form for its 50th anniversary.<ref>https://www.starwars.com/news/star-wars-50th-anniversary-theatrical-release</ref>
<noinclude>
